context: This criteria evaluates whether the agent uses the intended alert-state convenience workflow instead of bypassing the tile's helper command.

checklist.name: uses alerts subcommand
checklist.description: Uses `python3 scripts/prom_query.py alerts --state pending` (or equivalent requested state) from the bundled script.

checklist.name: states the generated promql
checklist.description: Explains the generated PromQL expression is `ALERTS{alertstate="pending"}` and shows it in output if present.

checklist.name: describes wrapper behavior
checklist.description: Notes that alerts is a convenience wrapper around the same Prometheus `/api/v1/query` endpoint used by `query`.
